insights.title: Model Recall (Fraud Catch Rate)
insights.description: The champion model (random_forest) correctly identifies 63.5% of all real fraud cases. Room to improve — consider retraining.
insights.recommendation: Consider lowering the decision threshold to catch more fraud.

insights.title: PR-AUC (Precision-Recall Area)
insights.description: PR-AUC of 0.4602 measures model quality under class imbalance. A random classifier scores ~0.026 (the fraud base rate). Your model achieves 17.8× improvement over random.
insights.recommendation: Strong model — focus on threshold tuning for operational deployment.

insights.title: KS Statistic
insights.description: KS = 0.7860 measures the maximum separation between fraud and legitimate score distributions. Strong discriminating power.

insights.title: Transaction Fraud Rate
insights.description: 4,126 of 160,000 transactions confirmed as fraud. Within normal range for mobile payments.
insights.recommendation: Fraud rate is healthy. Maintain current controls.

insights.title: Portfolio Default Rate
insights.description: 9,858 of 12,000 loans have defaulted or been written off. Critical — significant portfolio deterioration.
insights.recommendation: Review scoring cutoffs and consider tightening for high-risk segments.

insights.title: First Payment Default (FPD)
insights.description: 7,055 borrowers missed their very first payment (58.8%). FPD is the strongest early indicator of intentional fraud or severe mis-selling. Critical — possible systemic fraud or product mis-selling.
insights.recommendation: Investigate FPD borrowers for fraud patterns — check SEON score correlation.

insights.title: Portfolio Average Credit Score
insights.description: Average bureau score of 478 (range 300–850). Sub-prime heavy — elevated risk profile.
insights.recommendation: Consider product-level score floors to maintain portfolio quality.

insights.title: Expected Loss Rate
insights.description: Expected Loss = PD × LGD × EAD = 44.36% of disbursed portfolio. Total EL: KES 244,031,662 against KES 550,137,402 disbursed. This is the regulatory capital proxy — significant provisioning required.
insights.recommendation: Provision at least KES 292,837,994 (120% of EL) as loan loss reserve.

insights.title: Feature Distribution Drift (PSI)
insights.description: 3 feature(s) show early drift signs (PSI 0.10–0.25). Monitor closely — schedule retraining if trend continues.
insights.recommendation: Increase monitoring frequency. Consider online learning or model refresh.

insights.title: Model Return on Investment
insights.description: The credit+fraud model generates 2223% ROI against infrastructure costs. Total lifetime savings: KES 55,052,026 vs baseline (approve-all). Exceptional value delivery.
insights.recommendation: Document ROI to justify model infrastructure investment to stakeholders.

insights.title: Default Rate Reduction (Latest Period)
insights.description: Model reduced defaults from 20.2% to 7.1% — a 65.0% reduction. Strong credit quality improvement.
insights.recommendation: A/B test stricter cutoffs on high-risk segments to drive further reduction.
